name: HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS_R10
query: SELECT HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.EVALUATION_ID EVALUATION_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.PERSON_ID PERSON_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.EVAL_ROLE_ID EVAL_ROLE_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.ROLE_TYPE_CODE ROLE_TYPE_CODE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.PARTICIPATION_STATUS_CODE PARTICIPATION_STATUS_CODE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.STATUS_UPDATE_DATE STATUS_UPDATE_DATE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.DUE_DATE DUE_DATE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.ADDED_BY_ROLE ADDED_BY_ROLE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.NOTIFIED_FLAG NOTIFIED_FLAG, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.NOTIFIED_BY_ROLE NOTIFIED_BY_ROLE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.NOTIFIED_BY_PERSON_ID NOTIFIED_BY_PERSON_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.FDBACK_STARTED_FLAG FDBACK_STARTED_FLAG, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.FDBACK_SENT_BACK_FLAG FDBACK_SENT_BACK_FLAG, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.LOCKED_OUT_FLAG LOCKED_OUT_FLAG, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.LOCKED_OUT_DATE LOCKED_OUT_DATE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.FDBACK_COMPLETION_DATE FDBACK_COMPLETION_DATE, SUBSTR(HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.PCPN_COMMENT_TEXT_FOR_WRK, 1, 4000) PCPN_COMMENTS_FOR_WRK, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.MATRIX_PARTICIPANT_FLAG MATRIX_PARTICIPANT_FLAG, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.PCPN_COMMENT_TEXT_FOR_WRK PCPN_COMMENT_TEXT_FOR_WRK FROM HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS
